conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
# Pre-Game Reflection

I felt most connected to E, I, and H. With E, we immediately clicked on the idea that cooperation would benefit everyone, and there was a real sense of mutual trust and shared strategy from the start. I and H both brought that same genuine energy—we talked about needing this for our families, and they seemed straightforward about being willing to work together while staying smart. With C, I felt the least connected; the conversation felt more surface-level, and while we talked about teaming up, it didn't have the same depth or real commitment that I felt with the others.

I made informal agreements with pretty much everyone to keep each other in the loop once the rules were explained and to figure out the best moves together. I trust E, I, H, A, J, B, G, and D—they all seemed genuine about wanting to cooperate and were straight with me about their situations. I don't specifically distrust C, but the connection was weaker, so I'm going in with my guard up a bit more with them than with the others.
